metadata.description: Engineering best-practice skills for Go, TypeScript, Python, React, Angular, Next.js, and NestJS

plugins.name: golang-language
plugins.description: Go naming, interfaces, package layout, and anti-patterns

plugins.name: golang-error-handling
plugins.description: ErrorX sentinel pattern, errno directory, error propagation by layer

plugins.name: golang-logging
plugins.description: Zap Sugar API, log.W(ctx) context propagation, per-layer logging rules

plugins.name: golang-architecture
plugins.description: Clean Architecture layers (handler→biz→store→model) and Google Wire DI

plugins.name: golang-testing
plugins.description: Ginkgo BDD suites, Gomega matchers, uber-go/mock, DescribeTable, benchmarks

plugins.name: golang-api-server
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic Server interface, graceful shutdown, unified response

plugins.name: golang-gin
plugins.description: Gin engine setup, middleware chain, route groups, HandleJSONRequest pattern

plugins.name: golang-echo
plugins.description: Echo framework patterns — binding, middleware, error handler

plugins.name: golang-fiber
plugins.description: Fiber/fasthttp patterns — UserContext, BodyParser, concurrency gotchas

plugins.name: golang-nethttp
plugins.description: net/http + chi router patterns — standard library HTTP server

plugins.name: golang-makefile
plugins.description: Makefile patterns for Go projects — layered include structure, version injection from git, tools auto-install, and ##@ help system

plugins.name: golang-app
plugins.description: Go app bootstrap pattern — cobra command, pflag options, viper config loading, and the Options→Config pipeline

plugins.name: golang-database
plugins.description: GORM database client setup and store layer — connection pool config, IStore interface, context-based transaction propagation, concrete store implementation

plugins.name: typescript-language
plugins.description: TypeScript strict config, type patterns, no-any/enum/!, brand types

plugins.name: typescript-best-practices
plugins.description: Async/await, Promise.all, error handling at boundaries, DI patterns

plugins.name: typescript-tooling
plugins.description: ESLint flat config, Prettier, tsup bundling, tsc in CI, pre-commit hooks

plugins.name: typescript-security
plugins.description: Input validation, XSS/injection prevention, auth principles, CORS, secrets hygiene

plugins.name: python-language
plugins.description: uv + ruff + pyright toolchain, naming, type hints, StrEnum, anti-patterns

plugins.name: python-architecture
plugins.description: Layered architecture, SQLAlchemy 2.x async, FastAPI Depends() DI, Alembic

plugins.name: python-error-handling
plugins.description: AppError hierarchy, global exception handlers, propagation by layer

plugins.name: python-logging
plugins.description: loguru setup, context binding with contextualize(), per-layer logging rules

plugins.name: python-testing
plugins.description: pytest, parametrize, fixtures, AsyncMock, respx, asyncio_mode=auto

plugins.name: python-async
plugins.description: async/sync choice, asyncio.gather vs TaskGroup, blocking traps, to_thread

plugins.name: python-fastapi
plugins.description: lifespan, routers, Pydantic schemas, Depends() chains, middleware

plugins.name: python-data
plugins.description: Pandas ETL patterns, iterrows anti-pattern, chunked processing, Polars

plugins.name: python-cli
plugins.description: Typer app, Argument vs Option, subcommands, StrEnum choices, progress bar

plugins.name: react-language
plugins.description: JSX, hooks rules, derived state, useCallback/useMemo, Suspense, Error Boundary

plugins.name: react-patterns
plugins.description: Feature-based structure (bulletproof-react), custom hooks, compound components

plugins.name: react-forms
plugins.description: react-hook-form + Zod validation, Controller, server errors, FormArray

plugins.name: react-state
plugins.description: Zustand for client state, TanStack Query for server state, query keys

plugins.name: react-testing
plugins.description: Vitest + React Testing Library + MSW, userEvent, async queries

plugins.name: angular-language
plugins.description: Standalone components, Signals, @if/@for control flow, inject() function

plugins.name: angular-services
plugins.description: DI, HttpClient, functional interceptors, functional route guards

plugins.name: angular-forms
plugins.description: Typed Reactive Forms, nonNullable group, FormArray, Signal integration

plugins.name: angular-testing
plugins.description: Jest + TestBed, ComponentFixture, setInput(), HttpTestingController

plugins.name: nextjs-app-router
plugins.description: app/ structure, route groups, layouts, Server vs Client Components

plugins.name: nextjs-data
plugins.description: Server Actions, fetch caching, revalidatePath, TanStack Query, next/image

plugins.name: nextjs-api
plugins.description: Route Handlers, middleware, Auth.js, environment variable conventions

plugins.name: cypress-e2e
plugins.description: Cypress E2E testing — data-cy selectors, Custom Commands, cy.intercept, fixtures

plugins.name: nestjs-architecture
plugins.description: Module system, controllers, providers, DI, project structure

plugins.name: nestjs-guards
plugins.description: Guards, Interceptors, ValidationPipe (class-validator), Exception Filters

plugins.name: nestjs-testing
plugins.description: Test.createTestingModule(), mock providers, supertest E2E

plugins.name: nestjs-database
plugins.description: Prisma integration, repository pattern, transactions, migrations
